text: As generative AI floods the market with fast, low-cost content, luxury brands are learning to harness the tech without eroding the value of craft, authorship, and cultural authority. From “anti-slop” design cues to immersive real-world experiences, a new playbook is emerging.

text: Just renewed my Apple Developer account. You can expect some TestFlight soon with OpenXR apps on it :-)

text:
The good news about the Apple Developer renewal is that I'll be able to sign
- The OpenXR OSX compagnon
- Simulators / Players
- The OpenXR Runtime/Server itself (which is x64/arm64 for maximum compatibility)
And.... I'll be able to sign also Open Dark Basic and few games...
